command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Capture full body of ALL group messages incl the spam - watch 60s ==="
echo ">>> Send '@SakuraChanAssistant_bot hello' again to trigger the spam <<<"

# Capture all POST bodies to Sakura's webhook (she sees all group messages)
sudo timeout 60 tcpdump -i any -n -s 0 -A 'tcp port 8080 and tcp[((tcp[12:1] & 0xf0) >> 2):4] = 0x504f5354' 2>/dev/null > /tmp/spam_cap.txt &
TCPD=$!
sleep 2
echo "capturing..."
wait $TCPD 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Extract every message's from.id, username, and text from captured bodies ==="
python3 << 'PYEOF2'
import re, json
data = open('/tmp/spam_cap.txt','r',errors='ignore').read()
# Find all JSON update objects
for m in re.finditer(r'\{"update_id".*?\}\}(?=\s|$)', data):
    try:
        u = json.loads(m.group(0))
        msg = u.get('message') or u.get('channel_post') or {}
        frm = msg.get('from', {})
        sender_chat = msg.get('sender_chat', {})
        text = msg.get('text','')[:60]
        print(f"from_id={frm.get('id')} bot={frm.get('is_bot')} @{frm.get('username','?')} name={frm.get('first_name','?')} | sender_chat={sender_chat.get('id','-')}:{sender_chat.get('title','-')} | text='{text}'")
    except Exception as e:
        pass
PYEOF2

echo ""
echo "=== Raw: any A_ToolsX or join in captured traffic? ==="
grep -oiE "A_ToolsX|join our channel|t.me/A_[A-Za-z]*|sender_chat" /tmp/spam_cap.txt 2>/dev/null | head -10
sudo rm -f /tmp/spam_cap.txt
REMOTE
